title: 桜花賞の後に・最初の宝石

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Daiwa Scarlet seizes victory at the Oka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She declares loud and clear that no matter the
race, she'll be the one taking home first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, she starts preparing for the second
Triple Tiara tour race—the Japanese Oaks.
